description_long: This apartment building features a modern, geometric design with two main rectangular sections of differing heights, connected at a right angle. The exterior is clad in light blue panels, punctuated by regularly spaced, white-framed windows arranged in a grid pattern. The ground floor is distinguished by a darker base and multiple blue-accented entrances, suggesting commercial or communal spaces. The taller section rises three stories above the base, while the shorter section is two stories high, both topped with flat, white-edged roofs. The building lacks balconies and decorative elements, emphasizing clean lines and functional form. Its overall appearance is contemporary, suitable for urban residential neighborhoods.
description: A modern, light blue apartment building with two connected rectangular sections of different heights, featuring grid-like white windows and flat roofs. The ground floor has blue-accented entrances and a darker base, giving it a contemporary urban look.
description_view_0: This view shows the building's two main sections, highlighting the L-shaped connection and the grid of white-framed windows on both facades.
description_view_1: From this angle, the taller section is prominent, and the blue-accented entrances at the base are clearly visible.
description_view_2: This perspective emphasizes the longer facade of the building, showing the full extent of the window grid and the connection between the two sections.
description_view_3: Here, the shorter section is in the foreground, with the taller section behind, both displaying their flat roofs and window arrangements.
attribute_window_arrangement: The windows are arranged in a regular, symmetrical grid pattern across all visible facades, with even spacing and alignment both vertically and horizontally.
